checks.detail: task.toml declares [agent] user = "agent" for non-root agent execution.
reasons: present: [agent] user = "agent" at task.toml:10

checks.detail: All required isolation directives are present in the Dockerfile.
reasons: present: useradd agent (line 11)
present: chown -R agent:agent /app (line 27)
present: chown agent:agent /solution (line 18)
present: mkdir /tests && chmod 700 /tests (line 15), re-locked after refdata staging (line 85)
present: strace installed (line 7) — required since verifier runs agent code
present: extra hardening — /tests/refdata staged root-only with chmod -R go-rwx (line 86); .ref answer keys removed from agent-readable /app/tests (line 84)
note: uid 1000 not explicitly pinned; useradd defaults yield uid 1000 on debian slim, acceptable

checks.detail: test.sh locks /logs/verifier first then wipes, runs agent code as su agent under strace with timeout, and computes reward outside strace.
reasons: present: chmod 700 /logs/verifier BEFORE rm -rf (lines 39-40)
present: trap on EXIT guarantees fallback reward 0.0 (line 45)
present: exit 0 always (line 310; fail_with also exits 0 at line 61)
present: chmod 700 /tests re-lock after Harbor upload (line 48)
present: env sanitisation — unset LD_PRELOAD/LD_LIBRARY_PATH/PYTHONPATH/BASH_ENV/etc (line 52)
present: pkill -u agent before and after agent phase (lines 65, 119, 145, 188)
present: agent code wrapped in strace -f + timeout + su agent -s /bin/bash -c 'env -i ...' (lines 120-125, 146-151)
present: strace logs scanned for reward.{txt,json} openat with O_WRONLY/O_RDWR/O_CREAT (lines 126, 152)
present: compute_reward.py invoked OUTSIDE strace as root (line 308), invoked with python3 -ISs (no agent imports)
present: no chown root:root on /logs
present: no set -euo pipefail (avoids early abort without reward)

checks.detail: runs_agent_code — verifier builds agent's myld and executes agent-produced ELFs.
reasons: agent's myld is built via `make -C /app` under strace (line 150)
agent's myld is invoked to link tier objects (RUNNER, line 97)
agent-produced ELFs are executed via timeout 10 (line 102)
strace + su agent are mandatory and present
scoring (compute_reward.py) reads only static files (test_results.json, strace logs) — does not import /app
